hero.name: Gabrielle Roth
hero.eyebrow: 1941–2012 · creator of 5Rhythms · the wave that named what bodies already do
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(15 75% 60% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(255 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(20 65% 65%) 0%, hsl(15 35% 35%) 50%, hsl(255 30% 20%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
An American dancer, musician, and movement teacher whose map of moving meditation — **flowing, staccato, chaos, lyrical, stillness** — became the foundational vocabulary for a worldwide conscious-dance community. She did not invent the rhythms; she watched bodies on dance floors for years and noticed that every moving body, given permission and music, will pass through that five-phase arc. The wave map is the substrate-shape the body naturally finds when it is allowed.

*Gabrielle died in 2012. The practice continues through accredited teachers worldwide, regional chapters, and rooms like [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) in Colorado and [5Rhythms Ubud](/people/5rhythms-ubud) in Bali.*

facts.label: Lived
facts.value_md: February 4, 1941 — October 22, 2012. American dancer, musician, choreographer, and movement teacher.

facts.label: Founded
facts.value_md: The 5Rhythms moving-meditation practice (also called the Wave). Esalen Institute resident for years; gathered the practice through teaching bodies in retreat settings before formalising it.

facts.label: Books
facts.value_md: *Maps to Ecstasy: The Healing Power of Movement* (1989) — foundational text *Sweat Your Prayers: Movement as Spiritual Practice* (1997) *Connections: The Five Threads of Intuitive Wisdom* (2004)

articles.body_md:
**Flowing** — continuous, sourced from the feet, the grounded movement of the feminine.

**Staccato** — punctuated, sharp, the shape of boundary and definition.

**Chaos** — the release of the previous two into uncontained motion; nothing to hold.

**Lyrical** — playfulness, the bird-after-storm, airborne joy.

**Stillness** — the breath that holds the whole wave; not the end, the integration.

Together: *the Wave*. The body knows the sequence before the facilitator names it. The body recognises each rhythm when the music shifts because the body already knows it.
articles.heading: The five rhythms named

articles.body_md:
- The wave map as one of the cleanest demonstrations that *pattern precedes substrate* in this body's lineage. Pairs with [Michael Levin](/people/michael-levin) 's [lc-bioelectric-pattern](/vision/lc-bioelectric-pattern) at a different scale (body knows the shape before instruction).
- *Coherence as motion* — bodies in shared time learning timing, consent, release, play. The substrate of the Coherence Network's Ubud embodied lineage and Colorado ecstatic-dance arc.
- The Stillness rhythm at the end of every wave → integration as the practice that makes the rest land. Pairs with [lc-each-breath-whole](/vision/lc-each-breath-whole) (each cycle whole; close what was opened).
- The teacher-cooperative form (accredited teachers continuing the practice after the founder's death) → resonant with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (many sovereign cells holding one practice).
- Rooms in the network's lineage that carry her wave: [5Rhythms Ubud](/people/5rhythms-ubud) · [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) (Colorado).
articles.heading: What Gabrielle Roth has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: Gabrielle Roth — creator of 5Rhythms · the wave that names itself | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Gabrielle Roth (1941–2012) — creator of the 5Rhythms moving-meditation practice (flowing, staccato, chaos, lyrical, stillness). Her wave map underlies multiple lineage threads in this network, from 5Rhythms Ubud to Rhythm Sanctuary in Colorado.

en.footer_md:
**Public anchors:** [5rhythms.com](https://www.5rhythms.com/) · [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gabrielle_Roth)

**In-body record:** [5Rhythms Ubud](/people/5rhythms-ubud) · [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) · [Paradiso Ubud](/people/paradiso-ubud) · [lc-bioelectric-pattern](/vision/lc-bioelectric-pattern) · [lc-each-breath-whole](/vision/lc-each-breath-whole)

*Gabrielle died in 2012; the practice continues through the global community of accredited teachers. This page is a recognition of her wave in this network's lineage.*

note_from_body.body_md: Gabrielle's public archive lives at 5rhythms.com, tended by the global community of accredited teachers carrying the practice forward. This page recognises the role of the wave map in this network's body-vocabulary.
